comment: Phase 9 self-update prep. Hosted at /versions.json next to the landing page. The Tauri updater will fetch this to discover new releases. SHA-256 placeholders are filled in at release time by the build pipeline (TODO).

highlights: Research-driven mega-batch: 4 parallel agent dossiers → catalog 68 → 87
Intel 13/14gen Microcode + VBS Status Diagnostics cards
Live DPC sparkline · HID priority · MSI mode (safe-class) · IFEO priority for Fortnite/Valorant/CS2 · 9 service kills · 13 scheduled-task batch disable
Clean State Gaming community preset bundling 19 entries
Latency Probe (Toolkit): 6 gaming-relevant targets + custom-host slot for game-server ping from netstat
PCIe Link card (Diagnostics): flags x8/x16 regression + sub-max gen with ASPM caveat
AMD UCLK warning (Diagnostics): heuristic 1:2-mode flag for Ryzen 7000 above 6400 MT/s
Discord low-FPS research article (4 manual toggles + why we can't automate)
Audit deferral pass: all 8 UX/correctness flags from the 3-agent audit shipped
Per-NUMA/per-CCD DPC breakdown · NIC probe-and-log · formFactor desktop/laptop targeting
FileWrite resolved-path pinning · one-way action surfacing · registry error precision
Audit-driven correctness pass: 3 research agents validated every tweak
Catalog 78 → 68 honest tweaks (removed 10 placebos / folklore)
Fixed 2 actively wrong values + 2 revert bugs + 4 misleading rationales
Network Low-Latency rebuilt around tweaks that actually work on Win10/11
FileWrite engine action variant — catalog can ship Engine.ini / .nip / .cfg tweaks
Snapshot-backed byte-perfect revert · env-var path expansion · user-profile vs admin routing
DPC + Interrupt Time card on Diagnostics — measurable before/after for every preset (the differentiator)
Save baseline → apply → Refresh → see exactly what moved
Catalog 70 → 78: 8 deepest-impact latency tweaks (NIC interrupt mod / flow / RSS, core parking, PCIe ASPM, USB-3 link power, device-side HPET, TCP window cap)
Tournament FPS community preset bundles all 8
Scan rig state — see which catalog tweaks are already at target on your rig vs which would change
Per-row state badge (✓ already / ◐ partial / ✗ would change / ? unknown) + per-action breakdown when expanded
Last-scan summary + new On-rig filter
Diagnostics page — rig + live metrics + temps + disk-free in one snapshot, Copy-to-clipboard
Landing refreshed to v0.1.27 stats (70 tweaks, 10 presets)
Changelog page reachable from in-app nav
